problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: The key to What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? is Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area — specifically Transcranial magnetic stimulation — which would help 200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
